escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 MU Q3 FY2026 RECORD EARNINGS — $41.46B revenue (+346% YoY, beat consensus by 17%), $25.11 EPS (beat by 25%), 84.9% GM. Q4 guide $50B/$31 EPS. CEO: 'Tightness locked in to persist beyond calendar 2027'. MU after-hours +12% to $1,072.
escalatedRisks.status: CONFIRMED RECORD — June 25, 2026 09:00。MU $41.46B revenue, $25.11 EPS, 84.9% GM all records。DRAM $31.3B (76%), NAND $9.9B (24%)。Data center >$25B quarterly (annualized >$100B)。Q4 FY2026 guide: $50B revenue, ~$31 EPS, ~$10B CapEx。FY2027: CapEx higher QoQ, opex +$1B。HBM 2026 fully sold out, HBM4 ramping 2x pace of HBM3E。MU closed $1,048.19, after-hours $1,071.99 (+$23.80)。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR June 24, 2026 / TheStreet / Seeking Alpha / Investing.com / Perplexity Finance
escalatedRisks.detail: The $41.46B revenue beat represents the single largest positive surprise in storage industry history. The Q4 guide of $50B implies FY2026 full-year >$115B. The CEO's explicit statement that tightness is 'locked in to persist beyond calendar 2027' provides the most definitive multi-year supply-constrained outlook ever given by a major memory manufacturer. This effectively confirms that DDR5 and NAND procurement windows will remain extremely tight for at least 18 more months.

escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 DDR5 spot $46.667 — TWENTY consecutive ATH. ▲+0.36%. $47 just $0.333 away. June 24 session confirms 20th straight ATH. DDR4 16Gb $71.305 (▲+0.95%) continues past $70. DDR3 $11.386 (▲+1.02%) 14th day. DDR4 8Gb $35.90 flat 5th day. SK Hynix DDR5 margins at 90% — officially exceeds HBM profitability.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING — June 25, 2026 09:00。June 24 session confirmed $46.667 (20th ATH) ▲+0.36%。$47 just $0.333 away。DDR4 $71.305 continues past $70 milestone。DDR3 14th day accelerating at +1.02%。MU record earnings confirm structural shortage。SK Hynix DDR5 margins at 90% — first time DDR5 profitability exceeds HBM。
escalatedRisks.source: DRAMeXchange June 24, 2026 session + Micron Q3 FY2026 Earnings + Chosun/TrendForce/DigiTimes June 24-25
escalatedRisks.detail: DDR5 spot at $46.667 on June 24 — 20th consecutive ATH session。DDR4 16Gb breakthrough of $70 now confirmed with follow-through to $71.305。DDR3 14th consecutive day of acceleration。MU $41.46B record earnings removes any doubt about demand sustainability。SK Hynix DDR5 margins at 90% is unprecedented — the highest-margin memory product in history is now commodity DDR5, not HBM。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕🆕 SK Hynix DDR5 profitability at 90% — officially exceeds HBM margins. Signed 3-year Microsoft DDR5 supply agreement. Converting HBM3E production line to DDR5. HBM4 full-year shipment forecast revised down from 4.5B Gb to 4B Gb. 5-year plan to double total wafer capacity. US listing to raise up to $29.4B.
escalatedRisks.status: DEEPENING — June 25, 2026 09:00。SK Hynix (58% HBM market share) shifting production from highest-margin HBM to DDR5。DDR5 profitability at 90% confirms demand exceeds even HBM economics。Microsoft 3-year deal locks in long-term DDR5 revenue visibility。This is the single strongest structural confirmation of DDR5 bull market in 61 days of tracking。
escalatedRisks.source: Chosun Ilbo / TrendForce / WCCFTech / DigiTimes / overclock3d.net June 23-25, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: SK Hynix's decision to convert actual HBM3E production lines to DDR5, combined with 90% DDR5 margins, represents an unprecedented market signal。Microsoft 3-year deal provides multi-year revenue lock。HBM4 shipment downgrade (4.5B→4B Gb) further confirms DDR5 priority。5-year capacity doubling + $29.4B US listing demonstrate long-term commitment。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴🔴 DDR4 16Gb $71.305 (▲+0.95%) — $70 breakthrough confirmed with follow-through. June-to-date +$10.205 (+16.7%). DDR4 8Gb $35.90 flat for fifth consecutive day — structural stability. DDR3 $11.386 (▲+1.02%) 14th consecutive day of acceleration. Three-generation synchronized super-cycle deepening.
escalatedRisks.status: CONFIRMED FOLLOW-THROUGH — June 25, 2026 09:00。DDR4 16Gb single-session +$0.671 = +0.95%。$70 psychological barrier cleanly broken and extended。8th consecutive day outpacing DDR5。June-to-date +$10.205 (+16.7%)。DDR4 8Gb $35.90 fifth straight day stable。DDR3 +1.02% Day 14。
escalatedRisks.detail: The $70 breakthrough is now confirmed with follow-through to $71.305。DDR4 16Gb has outpaced DDR5 for 8 consecutive days。DDR4 8Gb stability at $35.90 for 5 consecutive days confirms structural stability。DDR3 at 14 consecutive days of acceleration demonstrates all three DRAM generations are in synchronized bull market。MU $41.46B record earnings provides fundamental confirmation。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 5 DAYS。Last remaining structural NAND supply risk after WF6 resolution。MU NAND record $9.9B (+74% QoQ)。MU CEO: 'Tightness locked in beyond 2027'。NAND contract Q2 +70-75% QoQ, cumulative x4.2-x4.5。PCIe4 TLC is the most direct beneficiary of MLC exit。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 25, 2026。Final 5 days of MLC NAND production。Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM。MLC is the sole remaining structural NAND supply cut。MU NAND record $9.9B + CEO confirms tightness beyond 2027。NAND contract Q2 +70-75%, cumulative x4.2-x4.5。Buy_now urgency: last week before MLC permanent exit on June 30。
escalatedRisks.source: TechPowerUp / Samsung / TrendForce / TweakTown / Counterpoint Research / Micron Q3 FY2026 Earnings June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: 5 days to act before MLC supply permanently offline。With WF6 crisis resolved (June 19), MLC exit is the sole structural NAND supply cut。MU NAND $9.9B record quarter confirms demand is accelerating into the MLC exit。NAND contract price data reveals +70-75% Q2 (cumulative x4.2-x4.5)。MU Q4 $50B guide implies NAND ASP continuing to increase。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢🟢🟢 WF6 SUPPLY CRISIS RESOLVED — Kanto Denka + Central Glass suspended July 1 permanent shutdown on June 19 after securing Chinese tungsten export quota allocations.
escalatedRisks.status: RESOLVED (DOWNGRADED from CRITICAL to ELEVATED) — June 25, 2026 09:00。7 days since resolution with no new developments。Japanese producers continue WF6 production with Chinese tungsten powder quota。Physical supply cutoff avoided。WF6 prices remain elevated (+200% YoY) but no longer facing physical supply disruption。NAND price expansion now solely driven by demand and MLC exit。
escalatedRisks.source: Hualihg / 36kr / BigGo / TrendForce / multiple sources June 19, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Risk resolved for 7 days with no new developments。Markets have absorbed the resolution。MU $41.46B record earnings + CEO tightness-beyond-2027 statement confirms NAND demand is sufficient to sustain pricing without WF6 supply shock。

escalatedRisks.detail: The 5→1 regression is now understood as a 1-day gap before tomorrow's 4-unit restock。407-unit September restock quantity is substantial and provides confidence in medium-term supply。Connection $33,047 and GovConnection $34,383 provide immediate procurement alternatives at 3-12% premium。MLC 5 days continues to push demand toward QLC but WF6 resolution means NAND supply is now demand-constrained, not supply-shocked。
